IRS990EZ.PrimaryExemptPurposeTxt: TO ENGAGE IN ACTIVITIES TO IMPROVE THE EMPLOYABILITY AND JOB SECURITY OF WORKERS AND ASSIST UNEMPLOYED WORKERS TRANSITIONING INTO AND COPING WITH RETIREMENT BY SPONSORING EDUCATION, COUNSELING, EMPLOYEE ASSISTANCE AND TRAINING PROGRAMS FOR UNEMPLOYED, UNDEREMPLOYED, AT RISK WORKERS AND RETIRED WORKERS AND TRAIN AND CERTIFY COUNSELORS AND OTHER PERSONNEL TO ADDRESS STRESS, MENTAL ILLNESS, GERIATIC ISSUES, DEMENTIA AND DRUG AND ALCOHOL DEPENDENCY AND LIKE BY-PRODUCTS OF WORKERS DISPLACEMENT, IN AN EFFORT TO ENHANCE THE WORKING LIVES AND RETIREMENT OF THIS GROUP OF WORKERS.

ProgramSrvcAccomplishmentGrp.DescriptionProgramSrvcAccomTxt: TO ENGAGE IN ACTIVITIES TO IMPROVE THE EMPLOYABILITY AND JOB SECURITY OF WORKERS AND ASSIST UNEMPLOYED WORKERS AND THOSE WORKERS TRANSITIONING INTO AND COPING WITH RETIREMENT, BY SPONSORING EDUCATION, COUNSELING, EMPLOYEE ASSISTANCE AND TRAINING PROGRAMS AND CERTIFY COUNSELORS AND OTHER PERSONNEL TO ADDRESS STRESS, MENTAL ILLNESS, GERIATRIC ISSUES, DEMENTIA AND DRUG AND ALCOHOL DEPENDENCY AND LIKE BY-PRODUCTS OF WORKER DISPLACEMENT, IN AN EFFORT TO ENHANCE THE WORKING LIVES AND RETIREMENT OF THIS GROUP OF WORKERS.

TO PROVIDE FINANCIAL ASSISTANCE TO IAM MEMBERS IN TIMES OF NATURAL DISASTERS - SUCH AS FLOODS, HURRICANES, EARTHQUAKES AND TORNADOES - AND TO TRAIN INDIVIDUALS WHO CAN PROVIDE NEEDS-ASSESSMENT, RELIEF AND COUNSELING TO THOSE WHO HAVE SUFFERED SUBSTANTIAL LOSSES DURING NATURAL DISASTERS.

TransferPrsnlBnftContractsDecl.DeclarationDesc: THE ORGANIZATION DID NOT, DURING THE YEAR, RECEIVE ANY FUNDS, DIRECTLY,OR INDIRECTLY, TO PAY PREMIUMS ON A PERSONAL BENEFIT CONTRACT.THE ORGANIZATION, DID NOT, DURING THE YEAR, PAY ANY PREMIUMS, DIRECTLY,OR INDIRECTLY, ON A PERSONAL BENEFIT CONTRACT.
